summary: Punchy Nak/Senn audience mix with good levels, but no details on the performance itself
review: The recording delivers a punchy sound and well‑balanced levels thanks to the Nak/Senn mix, making it a solid listening source. Reviewers did not comment on the musical set, so the show quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on audio quality; positive remarks about sound but no information on performance, leading to a moderate‑high rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Punchy sound, good levels; the Nak/Senn mix is noted as working well.
